description: A center pivot irrigation system reports a pressure drop in one of its spans, indicating a leak or broken sprinkler.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge the pressure drop alert and identify the specific span and location of the fault.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies the fault is in Span 5, near tower 6.

nodes.task_description: Automatically shut down the irrigation system to prevent water waste and further damage.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully sends the shutdown command.

nodes.task_description: Create a high-priority work order for a technician, including the precise GPS location of the fault.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a detailed work order with location data.
